Yeah, it’s a drink.

Discover why with our non-alcoholic spirits

Shop Now

Solving the age-old question...what to drink when you’re not drinking

Non-Alcoholic Spirits Reimagined

  • No sugar
  • All the flavor
  • No calories

Our flavors

  • Spice 94, 700ml

    Inspired by the deep woods and the spiced aroma of the forest floor. A warm, aromatic blend of allspice & cardamom with citrus top notes to balance the long bitter finish.

    $31.99

  • Garden 108, 700ml

    Rooted in memories eating fresh peas straight from the pod. A complex, herbal blend of peas & traditional garden herbs including rosemary, thyme & spearmint.

    $31.99

  • Grove 42, 700ml

    Our zesty, citrus blend is made using oranges, lemons, ginger, and lemongrass. A cool prickle of Japanese sansho peppercorn gives this non-alcoholic spirit a bright, dry finish.

    $31.99

  • Notas de Agave, 700ml

    A vibrant and refreshing blend of prickly pear, zesty lime and agave flavors with notes of vanilla, damiana flower & peppercorn to awaken the palate. Not currently available for purchase. Check back soon!

    $31.99

AWARD WINNING

  • #1 Top Trending Non-Alcoholic Brand
  • #1 Best-Selling Non-Alcoholic﻿‍﻿​‍​‍‌ Spirits Brand
  • The Low & No Masters
  • San Francisco World Spirits Competition
  • IWSC Low and No Drinks
How to enjoy

Pour. Mix. Sip.

A complex flavor profile with unrivaled depth provides the perfect base for any type of non-alcoholic cocktail.

our story

From a Lincolnshire farm to changing the way the world drinks

Seedlip began in 2014 at our founder, Ben Branson's, cottage in the British countryside. Drawing inspiration from a herbal remedy book from 1651 titled, The Art of Distillation, he began experimenting using home-grown herbs & a small copper still.
